# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }}

Author: {{ site.author.name }} — {{ site.author.bio }}

Site: {{ site.url }}
Feed: {{ site.url }}/feed.xml
Sitemap: {{ site.url }}/sitemap.xml
Tags index: {{ site.url }}/tags/

## About

{{ site.title }} is a technical blog by {{ site.author.name }} about agentic software engineering, the Codex CLI, and how AI is changing the way software is built. Articles cover CLI internals, prompting and workflow patterns, integrations, enterprise deployment, and adjacent tools.

The author is also writing a companion book: [{{ site.book.title }}: {{ site.book.subtitle }}]({{ site.book.leanpub_url }}).

## Canonical resources

- [RSS / Atom feed]({{ site.url }}/feed.xml) — full-text of every article
- [XML sitemap]({{ site.url }}/sitemap.xml) — complete URL list with last-modified dates
- [Tag index]({{ site.url }}/tags/) — browse by topic

## Recent articles

{%- assign recent = site.posts | slice: 0, 30 -%}
{% for post in recent %}- [{{ post.title | escape }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}){% if post.description %} — {{ post.description | strip_newlines | truncate: 200 }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

## Tags (top 20 by post count)

{%- assign all_tags = "" | split: "" -%}
{%- for post in site.posts -%}
  {%- for tag in post.tags -%}
    {%- assign all_tags = all_tags | push: tag -%}
  {%- endfor -%}
{%- endfor -%}
{%- assign unique_tags = all_tags | uniq | sort -%}
{%- for tag in unique_tags limit: 20 %}
- [{{ tag }}]({{ site.url }}/tags/#{{ tag | slugify }})
{%- endfor %}
